name: Lemon Basil Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Shake flour in the oven bag; place it in a 13x9x2-inch baking pan. Add lemon juice to the bag. Squeeze the bag to blend ingredients.
3. Remove skin from chicken, if desired. Place chicken in the bag. Turn the bag to coat the chicken with sauce.
4. Arrange chicken in an even layer; sprinkle with basil and seasoned salt. Place sliced onion over the chicken.
5. Close the bag with a nylon tie; cut 6 half-inch slits in the top.
6. Bake until chicken is tender, 30 to 35 minutes. Let stand in the bag for 5 minutes.
